message:
feat: add ARIA roles, reduced-motion support, and 44px touch targets to Spec Evolution Lab

Accessibility pass on the Spec Evolution Lab component:

- Add role="tablist" / role="tab" / role="tabpanel" with proper
  aria-selected, aria-controls, and aria-label attributes to the
  inspector tab bar
- Add aria-label to dialog elements, close buttons, prev/next commit
  navigation buttons, playback toggle, and speed control
- Add aria-live="polite" to the commit counter for screen reader
  announcements
- Add e.stopPropagation() on timeline slider keyboard handlers to
  prevent event bubbling conflicts

Reduced-motion (prefers-reduced-motion) respect:
- Disable VHS glitch static animation
- Disable logo spinning dashed border animation
- Collapse bucket filter entrance/hover/tap animations to static
- Disable timeline scrubber pulse animation
- Disable tab underline layoutId animation
- Collapse tab panel content transitions to zero-duration opacity

Mobile / touch targets:
- Increase min touch-target size to 44×44px on dialog close, search
  close, prev/next nav, playback toggle, and speed control buttons
- Change search input from fixed w-[320px] to w-full max-w-[320px]
  for mobile viewports

Tests:
- New spec-evolution-a11y-e2e.spec.ts covering tab ARIA roles,
  dialog Esc close, navigation labels, playback labels, timeline
  keyboard nav, mobile horizontal scroll, and 44px touch targets
- Update selectors in compare, perf, and search E2E tests from
  getByRole("button") to getByRole("tab") matching new ARIA roles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
